No deposit, full payment secures your booking. Dry studio hire; lighting & stands available to hire (extra). Cyclorama painting / repaint from R2 500. Overtime R1 000 / hour. Car shoots have no half-day rate. Full T&Cs at shamasestudios.co.za/terms-conditions.
